description: Report that recovery has been exhausted for a conversation

main.description: Report that a client has exhausted all recovery attempts for a conversation. Any member may report. When >=50% of active members have reported within a 1-hour window, the server auto-resets the group.

failureType.description: Type of failure that was exhausted

recorded.description: Whether the failure report was recorded

autoResetTriggered.description: Whether the quorum threshold was met and an automatic group reset was triggered

failureCount.description: Number of members who have reported failures within the expiry window

memberCount.description: Total number of active members in the conversation

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Caller is not a member of the conversation
